task_description: User alex.rivera@example.com has an active 'push' notification subscription where all event types are currently disabled. The user wants to optimize their daily engagement metrics and has requested that exactly four notification event types be enabled on this push subscription. Please retrieve the user's details using their email, identify their 'push' subscription ID, review the available event types in the system, and update their notification preferences to enable exactly four event types for that push subscription.

et_1.description: Alerts when another user starts following your profile.

et_2.description: Alerts when you receive a private message from another user.

et_3.description: Alerts when your username is tagged in a public post or comment.

et_4.description: Alerts when someone replies directly to a community post you created.

et_5.description: A curated digest of top articles and platform news across various categories.

et_6.description: Updates regarding newly released tools, capabilities, and system upgrades.

et_7.description: Invitations to live educational sessions and expert Q&A panels.

et_8.description: Suggestions for new discussion boards and content categories to explore.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Establishes the baseline state to locate the target push subscription before modifying preferences.
expected_actions: Call list_user_subscriptions with the retrieved user_id to find the subscription_id where channel_type is 'push'.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent successfully retrieves the subscription_id 'sub_push_1'.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Evaluates the catalog of event types to identify options that facilitate social interaction and audience building.
expected_actions: Call list_all_event_types to read the names and descriptions of all platform notifications.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent retrieves the full list of event types to evaluate their content.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Aligns with Extroversion by selecting events that place the user in the center of attention, allow them to influence people, and foster direct social interaction (New Follower, Direct Message, Profile Mention, Post Reply).
expected_actions: Call set_notification_preference to set is_enabled to true for event_type_ids et_1, et_2, et_3, and et_4 on sub_push_1.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of set_notification_preference exactly four times for the event types related to user-to-user interaction, followers, and profile visibility.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Locates the user's push subscription to prepare for the preference update.
expected_actions: Call list_user_subscriptions with the retrieved user_id to extract the push subscription_id.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent extracts the correct subscription_id 'sub_push_1'.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Evaluates the catalog of event types to identify options that offer learning opportunities and exposure to a wide variety of activities.
expected_actions: Call list_all_event_types to analyze the available notification categories.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent fetches the event types array to assess which ones provide diverse information.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Aligns with Breadth of Interest by selecting events that expose the user to a wide variety of activities and diverse learning opportunities (Weekly Newsletter, New Feature Announcement, Webinar Invite, Topic Recommendations).
expected_actions: Call set_notification_preference to set is_enabled to true for event_type_ids et_5, et_6, et_7, and et_8 on sub_push_1.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of set_notification_preference exactly four times for the event types related to discovering new topics, attending webinars, and reading newsletters.
